evals.name: reflection-wrapper
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 FrameDebuggerUtility 的反射封装类，不依赖 InternalAPIEditorBridge。需要包含：启用/禁用 FrameDebugger、获取帧事件数量、遍历每个事件提取 shader/pass/keyword 信息。使用 Delegate.CreateDelegate 做性能优化。
evals.expected_output: 生成一个完整的 FrameDebuggerReflect.cs 静态类，包含反射初始化、所有必需的方法/属性委托、事件数据字段访问器、以及异步 StartCapture 方法

assertions.name: uses-delegate-create-delegate
assertions.text: Uses Delegate.CreateDelegate for static method/property access (not MethodInfo.Invoke for simple getters)

assertions.name: get-frame-events-async
assertions.text: Has async capture via EditorApplication.update state machine or StartCapture-style method

assertions.name: extracts-shader-pass-keywords
assertions.text: Extracts shader info (name/instanceID), pass info (index/name/lightMode), and shader keywords from FrameDebuggerEventData via reflection field access

assertions.name: null-check-delegates
assertions.text: Null-checks all delegates before invocation; logs once and degrades gracefully on reflection failure

evals.name: capture-test-script
evals.prompt: 写一个 Unity Editor 测试脚本。功能：点击菜单 'Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events' 后，启动 FrameDebugger，逐帧遍历当前所有 drawcall 事件，提取每个事件的 shaderName、passName、lightMode、passIndex、shaderKeywords，输出到 CSV 文件保存到 Assets/FrameDebuggerOutput/events.csv。使用 FrameDebuggerReflect 工具类。
evals.expected_output: 生成一个 FrameDebuggerCaptureTest.cs 静态类，包含 EditorApplication.update 驱动的捕获循环、CSV 输出、正确的事件遍历逻辑

assertions.name: menuitem-tools-capture
assertions.text: Has [MenuItem("Tools/Frame Debugger/Capture All Events")] entry point

assertions.name: editor-update-state-machine
assertions.text: Uses EditorApplication.update as the tick mechanism with a state machine (Phase 1: wait for events, Phase 2: iterate with limit, Phase 3: cleanup)

assertions.name: per-event-limit
assertions.text: Sets limit per event (limit = targetIndex + 1) and waits one frame before reading GetFrameEventData

assertions.name: csv-output
assertions.text: Outputs CSV with proper RFC 4180 escaping (quotes fields containing commas, newlines, or double-quotes)

assertions.name: cleanup-on-done
assertions.text: Removes EditorApplication.update handler and disables FrameDebugger when capture completes

evals.name: variant-recorder
evals.prompt: 我需要把 FrameDebugger 捕获的 drawcall 信息和 ShaderUtil.GetShaderData 的 pass 元数据合并，生成一个带精确 passIndex 的 shader variant collection。功能：1) 用 ShaderUtil.GetShaderData 提取每个 shader 的所有 pass 信息（subShaderIndex, localPassIndex, passName, lightMode, PassType）；2) 对于 FrameDebugger 捕获的每个 drawcall，根据 passIndex 匹配到具体 pass；3) 按 (shader, passIndex, keywords) 去重并排序。
evals.expected_output: 生成多个文件：ShaderPassExtractor.cs（pass 元数据提取）、KeywordUtils.cs（关键词归一化）、VariantRecorder.cs（合并逻辑）

assertions.name: uses-shader-util-get-shader-data
assertions.text: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData to extract shader pass metadata

assertions.name: iterates-subshader-passes
assertions.text: Iterates through all subshaders and their passes, building a global passIndex across all subshaders

assertions.name: extracts-lightmode
assertions.text: Extracts LightMode tag from each pass (via FindTagValue reflection or similar)

assertions.name: pass-type-guessing
assertions.text: Has PassType guessing logic based on passName/lightMode (e.g. ShadowCaster, Meta, Deferred)

assertions.name: find-by-pass-index
assertions.text: Has FindByIndex method to look up pass metadata by global passIndex

assertions.name: find-best-match-fallback
assertions.text: Has fallback matching (FindBestMatch) with priority chain: passName → lightMode → PassType

assertions.name: keyword-normalization
assertions.text: Has keyword normalization: splits string, sorts, deduplicates

assertions.name: composite-dedup-key
assertions.text: Uses composite key including passIndex AND passName/lightMode for deduplication (not just shader+passType+keywords)
